name: ugc-5beat-seamless
description: Same 5 beats as ugc-5beat but every join is frame-matched (transitionOut=match) — plays like one continuous take. Adjacent beats share a boundary keyframe.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Stop the scroll in the first second with a pattern interrupt aimed at the target audience's pain or curiosity

beats.title: Problem
beats.goal: Make the viewer feel the specific pain/frustration the product solves — relatable, concrete, first-person

beats.title: Product Reveal
beats.goal: Introduce the product as the discovery; hero shot of the product with the label clearly readable

beats.title: Result
beats.goal: Show the product in use and the felt outcome — proof, reaction, transformation

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: Direct, single call to action with light urgency; point to the link/caption
